title: xanthophyllum heterophyllum
intro: Xanthophyllum heterophyllum is a species of flowering plant in the family Polygalaceae, commonly known as the 'Borneo walnut'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine, where it is used to treat various ailments. The health benefits of Xanthophyllum heterophyllum include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which are typically consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
